response.overview: Abidik Gubidik is a 1964 Turkish black-and-white comedy directed by Aram Gülyüz and written by Safa Önal.Hüsnü, a comic character who gets caught up in a mistaken-identity situation involving another man he resembles. The story mixes romance, crime, and show-business elements, with settings such as a nightclub/gazino and side characters including a singer, gangsters, and other colorful figures.
response.title: Abidik Gubidik
